subcodes.title: Religious Prejudices: Words spoken at Dreyfus home in Paris, 1911-10-27
subcodes.first_line: The basis of the teaching of Baha'u'llah is the Unity of Mankind, and his greatest desire was that love and goodwill should live in the heart of men.
subcodes.first_line_orig: چونکه تعلیم بهاء الله توحید جمیع بشر است و نهایت الفت و اتحاد و بقدر امکان
subcodes.subjects: @Muhammad; Islam, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @Christ; Christianity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @oneness; unity of religion
